title: helichrysum retusum
intro: Helichrysum retusum, also known as Rock Helichrysum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its small, yellow or white flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Helichrysum retusum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Helichrysum retusum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
